meaning: n.先令(1971年以前的英国货币单位)
examples: Mrs. Medlock said I was to have a shilling a week to spend.
There's twelve of us an' my father only gets sixteen shilling a week.
As the boy stood in doubt, Durbeyfield put his hand into his pocket, and produced a shilling (a unit of money used in Britain until 1971).
